calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John R. Browne, III, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Wahl & Company, Inc., a Corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Wayne Hu.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $6,353.33 which represents (a) the net unpaid amount of the $37,530.31 Promisory Note being sued on herein: and (b) 10% interest per annum from March 1, 2012 through March 17, 2013 on the unpaid principal amount of such Promisory Note; and
Attorney's Fees: $3,771.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,124.73
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Continued To Feb-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
